title: botrychium chamaeconium
intro: Botrychium chamaeconium, also known as the small rattlesnake fern, is a type of rare and endangered flowering plant in the Ophioglossaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Botrychium chamaeconium include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
